pred_reason: The SWC-101 label is justified due to identified integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in arithmetic operations without proper safeguards. The SWC-107 label applies because of reentrancy risks in changeName() where state changes occur after external calls to transferFrom and burn. Evidence: Integer overflow/underflow found in arithmetic operations despite SafeMath usage; Reentrancy vulnerability in changeName() violates Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern; External calls (transferFrom/burn) precede state modifications in changeName()
